subject: fix(content): address remaining review issues — bugs, dead code, perf
body:
Five fixes from final code review:

1. getCellPositionLabel: explicit early return for fullbleed layouts
   instead of falling through to the rows/columns loop that would
   return '' anyway — defensive against future fullbleed subdivisions

2. AdCanvas renderGridLayout: replace .filter() per section with
   pre-grouped bySection Map (O(1) lookup). The cellInfo useMemo now
   builds both flat cells array and grouped Map in a single pass.

3. FreeformCellEditor: remove unused `layout` prop (was destructured
   but never referenced in the component body)

4. MarkdownToolbar: pre-compute groupedMarkdownFormats at module level
   instead of calling .filter() inside the render loop on every render

5. AlignDefaultIcon: change from dimmed center-align (identical shape
   to AlignCenterIcon) to staggered lines (left-short, full, right-short)
   so Default and Center are visually distinguishable

Tags: cleanup, perf, ux, code-quality
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: content-tab-ux
Semver: patch
